zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland於1170年出生在法國曼恩時，她的父親Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumont33歲，母親Lucie de l'Aigle32歲。她於1189年9月5日與William 'The Lion' King of Scotland在英國英格蘭奧可福爾武德斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1233年2月11日在蘇格蘭費伏巴爾莫利諾享年63歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏巴爾莫利諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland于1170年出生在法国曼恩时，她的父亲Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumont33岁，母亲Lucie de l'Aigle32岁。她于1189年9月5日与William 'The Lion' King of Scotland在英国英格兰奧可福爾武德斯托可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1233年2月11日在苏格兰費伏巴爾莫利諾享年63岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏巴爾莫利諾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Ermengarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from erm(en) ‘whole, entire’ + gard ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Irmengard
meanings: Variant of   Ermengard .

variants.name: Irmingard
meanings: from erm(en) ‘whole, entire’ + gard ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Ermgard
meanings: from erm(en) ‘whole, entire’ + gard ‘enclosure’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland was born in 1170, in Maine, France, her father, Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumont, was 33 and her mother, Lucie de l'Aigle, was 32. She married William 'The Lion' King of Scotland on 5 September 1189, in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 11 February 1233, in Balmerino, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Balmerino, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland est née en 1170, à Maine, France, son père, Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumont, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lucie de l'Aigle, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William 'The Lion' King of Scotland le 5 septembre 1189, à Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1233, à Balmerino, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Balmerino, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland è nata il nel 1170 nel Maine, Francia, sua padre, Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumont, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lucie de l'Aigle, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William 'The Lion' King of Scotland il 5 settembre 1189, nel Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1233, nel Balmerino, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Balmerino, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotlandが1170年にフランスメインで生まれた時，父Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumontは33歳，母Lucie de l'Aigleは32歳であった。1189年9月5日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウッドストックでWilliam 'The Lion' King of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1233年2月11日にスコットランドフィフボーメリノで63歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフボーメリノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland(이)가 1170년 프랑스 맹에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumont(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucie de l'Aigle(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1189년 9월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 우드스톡에서 William 'The Lion' King of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1233년 2월 11일 스컷랜드 피프 바머이노에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 바머이노에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland nasceu em 1170, em Maine, França, seu pai, Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumont, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lucie de l'Aigle, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William 'The Lion' King of Scotland em 5 de setembro de 1189, em Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1233, em Balmerino, Fife, Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Balmerino, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la: бомонт-сур-сарт, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland родилась в 1170 г. в местности меин, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumont было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lucie de l'Aigle, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William 'The Lion' King of Scotland 5 сентября 1189 г. в местности вудстокк, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 февраля 1233 г. в местности балмирино, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности балмирино, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland nació en 1170, en Maine, Francia, su papá, Richard de Beaumont Seigneur of Beaumont, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lucie de l'Aigle, tenía 32 años. Se casó con William 'The Lion' King of Scotland el 5 de septiembre de 1189, en Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1233, en Balmerino, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Balmerino, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
